.gitignore.general_idea: Add the Maven wrapper directory to .gitignore to exclude generated wrapper files from version control.
Add the Flyway data migration script to .gitignore to exclude local test data from version control.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image to use Java 21 instead of Java 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update springdoc-openapi version to be compatible with the new Spring Boot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older springdoc versions may have compatibility issues with Spring Boot 3.5.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add modelmapper version property for centralized management.
Add oauth2-authorization-server version property for centralized management.
Add maven-compiler-plugin version property for centralized management.
Refactor OAuth2 dependency version to use the newly defined property.
Refactor modelmapper dependency version to use the newly defined property.
Add spring-boot-configuration-processor dependency to eliminate configuration metadata warnings.
Remove explicit version from flyway-core dependency to inherit from Spring Boot BOM.
Add dev profile configuration to the Spring Boot Maven plugin.
Clean up comments to remove outdated 'Boot 3.x' references.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/Application.general_idea: Refactor main method to access Spring Environment for debugging configuration values.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/Se.general_idea: Refactor dependency injection to use concrete CustomUserDetailsService instead of generic UserDetailsService interface.
Remove unused import for BeanIds constant.
Add /oauth2/token endpoint to permitted URLs for OAuth2 compatibility.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/security/oa.general_idea: Enable OpenID Connect (OIDC) support in the authorization server configuration.
Explicitly disable CSRF protection for the authorization server security filter chain.
Encode the client secret using a PasswordEncoder bean instead of storing it in plain text.
Add a JwtEncoder bean to support JWT encoding for the authorization server.

src/main/java/com/oauth/rest/service/Bas.general_idea: Add Spring Framework annotations for transaction management and non-null constraints to service methods.

src/main/resources/application-dev.prope.general_idea: Changed H2 database file path from a hardcoded absolute path to a user-home relative path for better portability.
Replaced server.address binding with explicit server.port configuration.
Changed JPA DDL auto mode from none to create to automatically generate schema on startup.
Increased OAuth2 refresh token validity duration.
Added default admin user credentials configuration.
Enabled password grant type for OAuth2 client.
Corrected Spring Security OAuth2 Authorization Server issuer property name.
Added configuration to enable specific grant types for the authorization server.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Change the default server port from 8080 to 8888.

src/main/resources/data.sql.general_idea: Remove Hibernate sequence initialization statements from the SQL data script.
src/main/resources/data.sql.before:
drop sequence if exists hibernate_sequence;
create sequence hibernate_sequence start with 1000 increment by 1;

src/main/resources/data.sql.general_idea: Remove the 'avatar' column from the 'usuarios' table insert statement.
src/main/resources/data.sql.before:
insert into usuarios (id, full_name, email, username, password, avatar, created_at, last_password_change_at) 
values (1, 'Admin admin', 'admin@oauth.net','admin','$2a$10$55jeMnYoXio8BTaQDtnc0OxjdQyv43TQ0D48YAkMGAFuswr944ZBC','https://api.adorable.io/avatars/285/admin@oauth.net.png',CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
src/main/resources/data.sql.after:
insert into usuarios (id, full_name, email, username, password, created_at, last_password_change_at) 
values (1, 'Admin admin', 'admin@oauth.net','admin','$2a$10$55jeMnYoXio8BTaQDtnc0OxjdQyv43TQ0D48YAkMGAFuswr944ZBC',CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
